archetype_reasoning: WAEC students need a platform that feels warm, encouraging, and highly focused. We avoid clinical EdTech blue and generic AI purple. Instead, we use 'African Modernity' tones—Terracotta, Moss, Warm Sand—to create a grounded, highly legible, and distinctly local-feeling study environment.

typography.font_install_instructions: Use Google Fonts for Outfit, Work Sans, and JetBrains Mono.
typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold text-[#1A1C1A]
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-semibold text-[#1A1C1A]
typography.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-medium text-[#1A1C1A]

surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF), 1px solid border (#E2DCD0), no heavy shadows. Hover state: subtle lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-md.
surface_strategies.header: Solid background (#F9F7F1) with a hard bottom border (#E2DCD0) to ground the app, no glassmorphism to keep reading focused.
surface_strategies.ai_chat_area: Abstract math texture background (math_abstract_bg) at 10% opacity. AI bubbles left-aligned in #F0EBE1 (text #1A1C1A), User bubbles right-aligned in #D95D39 (text #FFFFFF). KaTeX math blocks must have a #FFFFFF background with 1px #E2DCD0 border and rounded-md for isolation and clarity.

motion_interactions.card_hover: transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-[#D95D39]/30
motion_interactions.list_stagger: Framer motion staggered entrance for topic cards and past questions.
motion_interactions.page_transition: Simple opacity fade. Do not over-animate learning content.

component_guidelines.buttons: Shadcn standard. Primary uses #D95D39 (Terracotta). Secondary uses #2A4B46 (Moss). Rounded-xl.
component_guidelines.inputs: Shadcn input. bg-[#FFFFFF], border-[#E2DCD0], focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D95D39]/50 focus:border-[#D95D39].
component_guidelines.tabs: Override Shadcn fixed height. bg-[#F0EBE1] text-[#5C605A]. Active tab bg-[#FFFFFF] text-[#1A1C1A] shadow-sm.
component_guidelines.badges: For topic/difficulty tags: bg-[#F0EBE1] text-[#2A4B46] border border-[#E2DCD0]/50 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium.

hero_image.description: Main landing page hero image: African high school student studying.

math_abstract_bg.description: Subtle textured background for the AI tutor chat or practice mode dashboard.

student_studying_alt.description: Alternative photo of an African student using a laptop for 'About' or 'Practice' sections.

specific_views.landing_page: Bento Grid (Mode A) for features. Hero uses the hero_image with a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-black/60 via-black/30 to-transparent) to ensure text contrast for the value prop.
specific_views.dashboard_home: Control Room Grid (Mode B). Top left: 'North Star' metric (Progress/Score). Right: Modular topic cards (Algebra: linear equations, quadratics, etc.).
specific_views.past_questions_browser: List view. Shadcn Select/Dropdowns for filters (Subtopic, Year, Difficulty). Each question card has a 'Solve Step-by-Step' CTA in Moss Green.
specific_views.ai_math_tutor: Chat interface. Input area fixed at bottom. Must use KaTeX for rendering equations. AI responses must be formatted with clear spacing between steps, mimicking a WAEC examiner's layout.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for normal text. Terracotta (#D95D39) on Sand (#F9F7F1) meets criteria.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='start-practice-button', data-testid='filter-year-select').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the color palette. No Tailwind default blue, purple, or teal.
Ensure KaTeX is installed and configured properly (e.g. via react-katex) to render math formulas beautifully in the AI chat and Past Questions.
Build the dashboard mobile-first, ensuring all tables and grids collapse gracefully.
Use Shadcn components but override default Vercel aesthetics to match the warm, earthy theme.
Ensure the header is solid #F9F7F1, NOT glassmorphic, to maintain focus.
Images provided in the media section MUST be used; do NOT use placeholders.
